question_text: Which of the following is the best approach to ensure a web interface is interoperable across browsers, platforms, and assistive technologies?
primary_text: Evaluate accessibility across devices, platforms, browsers, and assistive technologies.

secondary.text: Identify how assistive technologies interact with browsers and other user agents, and explain what accessibility support means under WCAG.
Explain why certain HTML or ARIA features may have support gaps across browsers or assistive technologies and how to mitigate those gaps.

question_text: Which of the following requirements listed in Annex A, Table A.1 of EN 301 549 goes beyond the scope of WCAG?
primary_text: Identify EN 301 549 requirements beyond WCAG, including Annex A and Web Accessibility Directive implications.

secondary.text: Analyze the scope and intent of EN 301 549 requirements in Annex A Table A.1 that go beyond WCAG.
Compare WCAG with EN 301 549, including how WCAG requirements are incorporated and which additional EN 301 549 requirements extend beyond WCAG.
